title: Clean, in-window refund → approve recommended
customer_email: Hi, I bought item ord_1001 last week and it's not working as expected. I'd like a refund please. — Amara

envelope.agent_summary: Customer within 30-day window, no exception needed. Straightforward approve.

policy_clauses_cited.quote: Refunds within 30 days are approved automatically.

claims.statement: Order was placed within the refund window
